title: Movie Page Completed and Visual Style Unified
description: From March 13 to March 18, the movie page was completed step by step across features, interaction structure, and site-wide visual alignment.

items.content: Added CSV default mode from content/movies/movie.csv with watch dates and personal ratings
Added TMDB enhanced mode with Token/API Key fallback, posters, and release metadata
Added direct profile links for both Douban and TMDB
Moved data-mode and layout toggles into the same search row for faster control
Added list/grid switching with responsive grid density based on viewport width
Reduced card noise and prioritized title, rating, watch date, and external actions
Added watch activity calendar with year selector and daily heatmap counts
Built right-side stats panel for watch count, overall score (100-point), and 1-5 star distribution
Extracted reusable SegmentedToggle to unify toggle behavior across Movies and NavBar
Moved diagonal highlight effect to RootLayout and fixed bottom white-strip overflow
Flattened dark-mode toggle visuals to remove outdated glossy styling

title: Life Page Completed
description: Launched the Life waterfall feed with multi-image modal, comments, and filtering/sorting.

items.content: Added Life waterfall cards with date sorting
Added multi-select city filter dropdown
Multi-image modal with thumbnails and neighbor preloading
Support external image hosting and image load fallback/retry
Integrated Twikoo and displayed comment counts (auto refresh after posting)
Locked scroll/touch gestures inside the modal to prevent background scrolling

title: Website Performance & SEO Optimization
description: Comprehensive optimization of website loading speed, search engine friendliness, and deployment configuration.

items.content: Lazy load comments (Deferred Comments) to improve initial load speed
Implement responsive background images for better device adaptation
Add structured data (JSON-LD) for better search results
Optimize page meta descriptions and language codes
Update Vercel routing configuration (Rewrites)

title: Feature Updates & UX Improvements
description: Improved About page, integrated Lightbox, and optimized SEO & mobile experience.

items.content: Improved About Page (Intro & History)
Integrated Lightbox for Images
Enhanced SEO (Meta Tags, Sitemap, Prerender)
Auto-hide NavBar & Hamburger Menu Refactor
Optimized Mobile Padding & Layout
Introduced Category Filtering System
Added Tags Display in Archive Page
Introduced Headless UI Components (Dropdown)
Extracted & Organized Component Styles

title: Infrastructure Upgrade
description: Major update: Introduced image hosting, upgraded comment system, and optimized architecture.

items.content: Integrated img.markxu.icu Image Hosting
Upgraded Twikoo to 1.7.0 (Image Upload Support)
Standalone Vercel Backend Deployment
Optimized Markdown Image Loading & Layout

title: First Release
description: Mark's House is officially online, including basic features and blog module.

items.content: English/Chinese i18n Support
Dark/Light Mode Toggle
Blog Page Construction (List & Detail)
Home Page Construction
Article Search
Reading Time & Other Utilities
Table of Contents (TOC)

title: Project Kickoff
description: Project goals established and tech stack selected.

items.content: Repository Initialization
Tech Stack: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS
